producer_provenance.mixer_output_contract: The mixer copies the data-like flat H4l payload and does not persist a source-file token.

flat_source_join.disambiguation: For each ambiguous identity, compare all 111 copied fake-data h4lTree branches to the candidate modified-H4l entry. Every fake row had exactly one full-payload match.
flat_source_join.caveat: (run,lumi,event) alone is not a one-to-one source key; reproducible production must persist a source-file/source-entry token or equivalent mapping.

raw_identity_and_schema_scan.method: Single serial, read-only Uproot scan of only the 202 raw paths derived from full-payload-resolved h4l_mc_modified sources. Events were read in 50 MB identity chunks.

unavailable_raw_files.condition: ROOT file opens but has no keys and no Events tree.
ROOT file opens but has no keys and no Events tree.

raw_identity_and_schema_scan.schema_scope: Presence-only check; it does not validate object semantics, calibration provenance, or downstream reconstruction quality.

decision.pseudo_data_raw_object_status: Partial only: 647/652 rows have unique raw identity matches and the required branch presence, while five rows cannot be recovered from their selected raw counterparts.
decision.collision_data_status: Unresolved. This scan uses modified MC only and must not be represented as a collision-data substitution.
decision.required_next_step: Investigate documented replicas/alternate raw basenames for the two unavailable files. If none exists, keep a five-row object-unavailable record and obtain an explicit strategy/physics-owner decision before using a 647-row subset.
